This confuses new developers who don't know if these are the same thing. Rename all ToothPaste references to GOSTT-KBD.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"charles.scholle1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-23T03:35:46Z","created_by":"chaz8080","updated_at":"2026-02-23T03:35:46Z"}

new_value: Renamed all ToothPaste references to GOSTT-KBD in Go source, Taskfile, config. HKDF constant preserved. All 37 BLE tests pass.

old_value: {"id":"gostt-writer-9bv","title":"Fix: gohook CGEventTap deadlocks main queue on every keypress","description":"On macOS, gohook's hook_run() calls dispatch_sync_f(main_queue, ...) on every keypress to perform Unicode character lookup. Since listener.Start() is called from a goroutine (not the main OS thread), dispatch_sync_f deadlocks because Go's main goroutine never pumps the GCD main queue. This causes the CGEventTap to timeout and be disabled, leaving the app unresponsive to key events and preventing clean exit.\\n\\nFix: Run listener.Start() on the main OS thread (with runtime.LockOSThread()) by moving the event processing loop to a separate goroutine. This makes event_loop == CFRunLoopGetMain(), which skips the dispatch_sync_f path in process_key_pressed and calls keycode_to_lookup directly instead.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"charles.scholle1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-23T03:41:44Z","created_by":"chaz8080","updated_at":"2026-02-23T03:41:44Z"}

new_value: Fixed by running listener.Start() on the main OS thread (with runtime.LockOSThread()) and moving the event processing select loop to a goroutine. This ensures CGEventTap runs on the main thread, making event_loop == CFRunLoopGetMain() in hook_run(), which skips the dispatch_sync_f(main_queue,...) deadlock path.

old_value: {"id":"gostt-writer-gmr","title":"[bug] fw-setup task missing --recursive on submodule init","description":"Taskfile.yml line 280: fw-setup runs 'git submodule update --init third_party/esp-idf' but ESP-IDF has nested submodules requiring --recursive. A new developer using 'task fw-setup' will get an incomplete ESP-IDF and the toolchain install may fail silently or produce confusing errors. Add --recursive flag.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"charles.scholle1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:16Z","created_by":"chaz8080","updated_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:16Z"}

{"id":"gostt-writer-sdo","title":"Add sdkconfig.old to .gitignore","description":"firmware/esp32/sdkconfig.old is untracked and shows in git status. The .gitignore already excludes firmware/esp32/sdkconfig but not the .old variant generated by ESP-IDF when sdkconfig changes. Add it to .gitignore.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charles.scholle1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:19Z","created_by":"chaz8080","updated_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:19Z"}

{"id":"gostt-writer-l8y","title":"task install doesn't mention BLE/ESP32 option","description":"The 'task install' flow (the main onboarding path) installs whisper/parakeet models and the binary but never mentions the ESP32 BLE option. A new developer following the README's Build \u0026 Install section won't know about BLE output unless they scroll to the ESP32 section. Add a brief mention or pointer after install completes.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charles.scholle1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:22Z","created_by":"chaz8080","updated_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:22Z"}

{"id":"gostt-writer-14w","title":"No single task for full BLE first-run setup","description":"Setting up BLE requires knowing the sequence: submodule init -\u003e install toolchain -\u003e build firmware -\u003e flash -\u003e pair -\u003e configure inject.method. The BLE quickstart in README documents it, but there's no 'task ble-setup' or similar that automates or guides this. Consider adding a task that chains fw-setup -\u003e fw-build -\u003e fw-flash -\u003e ble-pair.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charles.scholle1@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:24Z","created_by":"chaz8080","updated_at":"2026-02-23T03:52:24Z"}

new_value: Added --recursive to fw-setup submodule init in Taskfile.yml
Install task now prints BLE setup instructions after completion
Added task ble-setup with guided interactive flow
